AuraScope is a terminal workspace inspector and navigation utility focused on speed, clarity, and keyboard-driven workflows.

This release provides:

- Linux binary archive (`.tar.gz`)
- Linux Debian package (`.deb`)
- Linux RPM package (`.rpm`)
- macOS binary archive (`.tar.gz`)
- Windows executable (`.exe`)

Shell warp integration is available through the wrapper scripts included in this repository:

- `src/shell/ascope.sh` for Bash and Zsh
- `src/shell/ascope.ps1` for PowerShell

Refer to `README.md` for installation, shell setup, and usage details.
